message:
feat(cli): add list-priors command stub and improve BF formatting

Adds infrastructure for the `pt agent list-priors` command and improves
Bayes Factor display formatting in the explain command.

Changes:

1. New `list-priors` subcommand (stub):
   - Adds AgentCommands::ListPriors variant
   - AgentListPriorsArgs with:
     - --class: Filter by class (useful, useful_bad, abandoned, zombie)
     - --verbose/-v: Include all hyperparameters
   - Stub implementation outputs placeholder message
   - Prepares CLI surface for future prior introspection feature

2. Improved Bayes Factor formatting in `agent explain`:
   - Extreme BF values (>1e6 or <1e-6) now use scientific notation
   - Prevents overflow/underflow display issues in terminal output
   - Handles infinite values gracefully
   - Standard values still show with 2 decimal places

The list-priors command will eventually allow users to inspect their
current prior configuration, see per-class hyperparameters, and
understand how the Bayesian inference is configured.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
